title: Calendar view to have only particular dates highlighted and the whole timeline
excerpt:
I have two boards: Board 1 and Board 2. 
In Board 1 , I have item 1 and item 2 with milestones 12 sept 2023 and 26 sept 2023 respectively. 
In Board 2, I have item 3 and item 4. 
I connect Board 1 and Board 2, in Board 2…

posts.author: nsharma (Nimisha Sharma)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have two boards: Board 1 and Board 2.
In Board 1 , I have item 1 and item 2 with milestones 12 sept 2023 and 26 sept 2023 respectively.
In Board 2, I have item 3 and item 4.
I connect Board 1 and Board 2, in Board 2 I have item 3 and item 4. To the item 3 and item 4, I have mirrored the milestone column for item 1 and item 2 from Board 1. Now in Board 2, I have created a calendar view. The mirror columns show timeline from September 12 to September 26 but I want to view a diamond(milestone) in September 12 and September 26 and not the whole time period from September 12 to September 26 to be highlighted.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there! This sounds like something that maybe would more easily be understood and fixed via Zoom call! If you’re still having issues with this, let us know at support@monday.com and we can hop on a Zoom to figure this out together!
